name: fake-gh-plan-create
prompt: Create a durable GitHub planning issue titled REST migration plan through the GitHub planning helper using plan-body.md.

files.plan-body.md:
## Finish Line

Ship the REST migration.

item.name: shell_command
item.arguments: {"command": "CODEX_GITHUB_TOKEN=synthetic-harness-token GH_WITH_ENV_TOKEN_GH=\"$(dirname \"$(dirname \"$CODE_EXEC_HARNESS_GH_STATE\")\")/bin/gh\" uv run \"$CODE_HOME/skills/github/scripts/gh-plan.py\" --repo cbusillo/codex-skills create 'REST migration plan' --body-file plan-body.md", "timeout_ms": 30000}
